name: Teahouse Minamikaze (Sumida)
editor_note: Chairs rather than tatami, and you whisk your own bowl after watching the host prepare the first — an easy, hands-on session for visitors. But skip the tatami room and this won't give you the atmosphere of a real tea room or its utensils.
notes: 292 Viator reviews, 'Top 1%' badge. Two-bowl format: guest first drinks tea prepared by host, then prepares their own. 6th-floor building near Asakusa/Skytree, not a dedicated teahouse.
price_note: Price not yet confirmed — check listing directly.
